scripts.celo: terraform -chdir=infra workspace select celo && npm run cache:clear
scripts.celo-sepolia: terraform -chdir=infra workspace select celo-sepolia && npm run cache:clear
scripts.deploy:celo: terraform -chdir=infra workspace select -or-create celo && terraform -chdir=infra apply
scripts.deploy:celo-sepolia: terraform -chdir=infra workspace select -or-create celo-sepolia && terraform -chdir=infra apply
scripts.deploy:monad-testnet: terraform -chdir=infra workspace select -or-create monad-testnet && terraform -chdir=infra apply
scripts.destroy:celo: terraform -chdir=infra workspace select celo && terraform -chdir=infra destroy
scripts.dev: nodemon --watch 'src/**/*.ts' --exec 'npm run build && npm run start'
scripts.monad-testnet: terraform -chdir=infra workspace select monad-testnet && npm run cache:clear
scripts.plan:celo: terraform -chdir=infra workspace select celo && terraform -chdir=infra plan
scripts.plan:celo-sepolia: terraform -chdir=infra workspace select celo-sepolia && terraform -chdir=infra plan
scripts.plan:monad-testnet: terraform -chdir=infra workspace select monad-testnet && terraform -chdir=infra plan
scripts.todo: git ls-files -c --exclude-standard | grep -v "package.json" | xargs grep -n -i --color "TODO:\|FIXME:" || true
